tech.title: International Space Station receives its first crew module
tech.description: The Unity node is launched aboard Space Shuttle Endeavour, becoming one of the core connecting modules of the ISS.

tech.title: NASA reveals water evidence on Mars
tech.description: New images show liquid water may still flow on Mars today, reshaping theories about Martian geology.

tech.title: IBM introduces the world’s first hard disk drive
tech.description: The IBM 305 RAMAC ushers in modern data storage, replacing punch cards with magnetic disk memory.

history.title: Charlemagne becomes sole ruler of the Frankish Kingdom
history.description: Following the death of his brother Carloman, Charlemagne becomes the undisputed king of the Franks.

history.title: First edition of The Observer published
history.description: The British newspaper 'The Observer' is first printed, becoming the world’s oldest Sunday newspaper.

history.title: Pan Am ceases operations
history.description: After decades as one of the world’s most iconic airlines, Pan American World Airways shuts down due to financial collapse.

world_events.title: Flight 19 disappears in the Bermuda Triangle
world_events.description: A squadron of five U.S. Navy torpedo bombers vanishes during a training flight, fueling decades of speculation about the Bermuda Triangle.

world_events.title: Dianne Feinstein becomes San Francisco’s first female mayor
world_events.description: Following the assassination of Mayor George Moscone, Feinstein assumes office, beginning a long political career.

world_events.title: Civil unrest escalates in France
world_events.description: Riots spread across French cities amid social tension, youth unrest, and clashes with police.

world_events.title: Typhoon Hagupit makes landfall in the Philippines
world_events.description: A powerful typhoon strikes Eastern Samar, forcing the evacuation of hundreds of thousands of residents.

births.title: Birth of Jay-Z
births.description: American rapper, mogul, and entrepreneur who becomes one of the most influential figures in hip-hop history.

births.title: Birth of Orlando Brown
births.description: American actor known for 'That’s So Raven' and Disney Channel roles.

births.title: Birth of Jeff Bridges
births.description: Academy Award-winning American actor known for 'The Big Lebowski', 'Crazy Heart', and 'True Grit.'

deaths.title: Death of Frank Zappa
deaths.description: American musician and composer known for his experimental rock, satire, and genre-blending originality.

deaths.title: Death of Horace Greeley
deaths.description: American newspaper editor and founder of the New-York Tribune, known for his political activism and the phrase 'Go West, young man.'

deaths.title: Death of Bob Dole
deaths.description: American senator and longtime political figure who served as U.S. Senate Majority Leader and was the 1996 Republican presidential nominee.
